SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-02-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-02-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF VOCTOR JOSE CUNADA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS SANTIPAP PRAMUALPHOL AND JUNE PRAMUALPHOL ARE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-02-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CUNADA, VICTOR JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PRAMUALPHOL, SANTIPAP PRAMUALPHOL, JUNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
